expectations.evidence: Uses correct variable names PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN
Values test-user-key and test-app-token match the prompt

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Puts credentials directly in ~/.zshrc which could be committed to a dotfiles repo

eval_feedback.overall: Gets variable names right by convention but writes to wrong file
